\documentclass[border=6pt]{standalone}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{arrows.meta,positioning,calc,fit,backgrounds}
\definecolor{mbblue}{HTML}{1F5A85}
\definecolor{mbteal}{HTML}{287C72}
\definecolor{mbgold}{HTML}{B7832F}
\definecolor{mbred}{HTML}{A94C4C}
\definecolor{mbink}{HTML}{233142}
\definecolor{mbmuted}{HTML}{667085}
\definecolor{mbcream}{HTML}{F8F2E8}

\begin{document}
% Presentation mode: __MODE__
\begin{tikzpicture}[
  font=\sffamily,
  >=Stealth,
  title/.style={font=\sffamily\bfseries\Large, text=mbink},
  lab/.style={font=\sffamily\scriptsize, text=mbink, align=center},
  directlabel/.style={font=\sffamily\scriptsize, text=mbink, align=center},
  explainer/.style={draw=mbteal, rounded corners=2pt, fill=mbcream, line width=0.85pt, align=center, inner sep=4pt},
  teachingnote/.style={font=\sffamily\scriptsize, text=mbmuted, align=center},
  researchlabel/.style={font=\sffamily\scriptsize, text=mbink, align=center},
  axis/.style={mbink, line width=0.75pt},
  arr/.style={->, draw=mbmuted, line width=0.75pt}
]
\node[title, anchor=west] at (0,5.45) {Parallel Trends Diagnostic};

\draw[axis, ->] (0,0) -- (8.8,0);
\draw[axis, ->] (0,0) -- (0,4.55);
\node[lab, anchor=west] at (8.25,-0.35) {Time};
\node[lab, anchor=west] at (0.10,4.68) {Mean outcome};

\draw[mbred, dashed, line width=0.85pt] (4.4,0) -- (4.4,4.25);
\node[directlabel] at (4.4,-0.35) {$t=0$};

\draw[mbblue, line width=1.25pt] plot[smooth] coordinates {(0.8,1.58) (2.0,1.95) (3.2,2.32) (4.4,2.70) (5.6,3.26) (6.8,3.72) (8.0,4.05)};
\draw[mbteal, line width=1.25pt] plot[smooth] coordinates {(0.8,0.95) (2.0,1.32) (3.2,1.70) (4.4,2.08) (5.6,2.46) (6.8,2.83) (8.0,3.22)};
\draw[mbblue, dashed, line width=0.95pt] plot[smooth] coordinates {(4.4,2.70) (5.6,3.08) (6.8,3.46) (8.0,3.84)};

__ANNOTATION_BLOCK__

\node[researchlabel, anchor=west, text=mbblue] at (8.15,4.05) {Treated};
\node[researchlabel, anchor=west, text=mbteal] at (8.15,3.22) {Control};
\node[researchlabel, anchor=west, text=mbblue] at (8.15,3.77) {Counterfactual};

__NOTE_BLOCK__
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{document}
